narrative:
Blue Ash 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,041 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
